zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Saint-Hilaire於1132年出生在英國素福爾可克萊爾時，她的父親Sir James Harcourt de St Claire36歲，母親Aveline de Hesdin33歲。她和William d’Aubigny至少有1個女兒。她去世於1193年12月24日在英國諾福爾可享年61歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可卡布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint-Hilaire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Haitian: variant of Saint-Hilaire (see St. Hilaire ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This form of the surname is very rare in France; it is more common in Haiti and in the Dominican Republic.

variants.name: St. Hilaire
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Marcel, Andre, Armand, Donat, Lucien, Normand, Serge, Alexandrine, Alphonse, Anselme, Antoine.

French (mainly southwestern; Saint-Hilaire): habitational name from any of several places in France called Saint-Hilaire (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Hilarius), or a nickname with the prefix Saint as an (ironic) attachment to the personal name or surname Hilaire . Compare Sainthilaire .

Haitian (also Saint-Hilaire): from Saint-Hilaire, a nickname, ornamental name, or personal name composed of the French prefix Saint and the personal name Hilaire , or perhaps a habitational name from a place in Haiti called Saint-Hilaire (compare 1 above). This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic, where it may (also) originate from France.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Saint-Hilaire was born in 1132, in Clare, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir James Harcourt de St Claire, was 36 and her mother, Aveline de Hesdin, was 33. She had at least 1 daughter with William d’Aubigny. She died on 24 December 1193, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Carbrooke, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Saint-Hilaire est née en 1132, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Harcourt de St Claire, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Aveline de Hesdin, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec William d’Aubigny. Elle est décédée le 24 décembre 1193, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Carbrooke, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Saint-Hilaire 1132 in Clare, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Harcourt de St Claire 36 und ihre Mutter Aveline de Hesdin 33. Sie hatte mit William d’Aubigny mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Dezember 1193 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Carbrooke, Norfolk, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con William d’Aubigny. Morì il 24 dicembre 1193, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Carbrooke, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Saint-Hilaireが1132年にイギリススフォルククラーで生まれた時，父Sir James Harcourt de St Claireは36歳，母Aveline de Hesdinは33歳であった。彼女はWilliam d’Aubignyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1193年12月24日にイギリスノーフォルクで61歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクカーブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Saint-Hilaire(이)가 1132년 영국 수폴크 클래르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Harcourt de St Claire(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aveline de Hesdin(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William d’Aubigny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1193년 12월 24일 영국 노르폴크에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 카브룩에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com William d’Aubigny. Ela faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1193, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Carbrooke, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Saint-Hilaire родилась в 1132 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Harcourt de St Claire было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline de Hesdin, 33. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от William d’Aubigny. Она умерла 24 декабря 1193 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности карбрук, норфолк, Англия.
